name: io.github.lordbasilaiassistant-sudo/thryx-mcp-server
title: ThryxProtocol MCP Server
description: ThryxProtocol v3.1 on Base — gasless AI agent launchpad + trading platform. 21 tools wrap the thryx.fun HTTP API: launch V4-native tokens with anti-sniper hook (80%→1% over 60s), buy/sell on bonding curves or graduated V4 pools, claim creator/referral fees, scan portfolios, query trending/graduating/leaderboard/safety scores. Server-managed wallets via auto-register on first run — no private keys, no local signing, no LLM API bills (the platform's own LLM autotrader is also free). 880+ tokens launched on Diamond proxy 0x2F77b40c124645d25782CfBdfB1f54C1d76f2cCe.

environmentVariables.name: THRYX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your THRYX API key (starts with thryx_). Get one for free with `curl -X POST https://thryx.fun/api/agent/register`. If unset, the package auto-registers a fresh wallet on first run and saves the key to ~/.thryx-mcp/credentials.json.

environmentVariables.name: THRYX_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the launchpad base URL. Defaults to https://thryx.fun.
